The '''''Handree''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] that was in operation with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The vessel was stationed on [[Isis/Legends|Isis]] and supplied medicalstuffs to guerrilla rebels on [[Polmanar/Legends|Polmanar]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] survey crew of the ''[[Wanderer]]'' hijacked the vessel, transporting it to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Alliance operatives recaptured the ship before the Isis location could be exposed.

{{Ship-stub}}
